title: clerodendrum bracteatum
intro: Clerodendrum bracteatum, also known as the glorybower, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The plant has several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Clerodendrum bracteatum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, and its leaves and stems are used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues.
